original_image_tags: A single sheet of aged, off-white paper. The page is blank except for two identical "RESTRICTED" stamps, one centered at the top and one centered at the bottom. Very faint, mirrored text is visible through the paper, suggesting printing on the reverse side or bleed-through from another page.

elements.description: The page contains two identical stamped words, 'RESTRICTED', one centered at the top and one centered at the bottom. The rest of the page is blank with a faint textured background and no other visual content.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content: two identical 'RESTRICTED' stamps, one centered at the top and one at the bottom, on an otherwise blank page.
